title: Untamed Fury
writer: Taylor Caven, Paul Gerard Smith, Ewing Scott
actors: Steve Pendleton, Mikel Conrad, Leigh Whipper
plot: A native son returns to the isolated, backwards village in the Okefenokee Swamp where he was raised, with ideas of bringing modern day progress in terms of schools, canals, new roads, running water, and other needed changes, but i...
